info.name: UstaGallery API Tests
info.description: Full Newman test suite — Auth, User, Groups, Photos, Products, Styles, Events, Classes, Schedule

item.name: Create Professor Profile - 409 on duplicate uid (admin)

exec: pm.test('Status 403 — admin cannot create student profile', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Update Product Status - REJECTED without feedback returns 400 (professor)
